summary: Backend refactoring phase 2 verification complete. All 17 tests passed (100%). The extraction of routes from prevention.py into prevention_nc.py, prevention_media.py, prevention_inspections_visuelles.py, and prevention_config.py was successful. Fixed router registration order in server.py to ensure /batiments/map is matched before /batiments/{batiment_id}.
critical_code_review_comments: Router registration order in server.py was incorrect - prevention_config_router must be registered BEFORE prevention_router to ensure /batiments/map is matched before /batiments/{batiment_id}. This was fixed during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Prevention module refactoring phase 2 verified. Routes extracted from prevention.py (~5315 → 1630 lines) into 7 files total. All 111 endpoints work. Router registration order in server.py is critical - specific routes (like /batiments/map) must be registered before generic routes (like /batiments/{batiment_id}).

prevention_media.py_routes.GET /api/demo/prevention/icones-personna: 200 OK - Returns list of custom icons

prevention_config.py_routes.GET /api/demo/prevention/batiments/map: 200 OK - Returns buildings for map display

prevention.py_core_routes.GET /api/demo/prevention/references: 200 OK - Returns categories and risk levels

new_files_phase2: prevention_inspections_visuelles.py - 484 lines (12 routes for inspections visuelles)
existing_files_phase1: prevention_plans.py - 1122 lines (15 routes for plans d'intervention)
refactoring_verification.router_registration_fix: Reordered routers in server.py lines 6758-6764 - prevention_config_router now registered BEFORE prevention_router
